file_title: Energy Efficiency in Lee's Market Operations
introduction: This presentation will provide an overview of our recent energy efficiency initiatives, with a focus on the upgrade of refrigeration systems in 20 of our stores in Q1 2025. The aim is to understand the impact of these upgrades on our energy consumption.

subsections.heading: Overview of Energy Efficiency Initiatives
subsections.content:
• In Q4 2024, Lee's Market committed to a comprehensive energy optimization program
• Across the industry, energy costs represent, on average, 2-3% of retailers’ total operating costs
• Lee's Market has prioritized upgrading lighting systems in its stores
• The company has also invested in energy-efficient heating and cooling systems
• A dedicated sustainability team was established in early 2025 to oversee these initiatives
• The team is also responsible for conducting regular energy audits and training staff on energy conservation techniques
subsections.justification: This content provides general information about energy efficiency initiatives but doesn't specify the impact of refrigeration system upgrades.

subsections.heading: Impact of Refrigeration System Upgrades
subsections.content:
• Upgrading refrigeration systems can lead to energy savings of 20-50%
• Lee's Market implemented a training program for staff to properly manage the new systems
• The company also conducted a comprehensive evaluation of its refrigeration equipment in Q4 2024
• The new refrigeration systems are expected to have a lifespan of 15-20 years
• The company is also analyzing the possibility of investing in renewable energy sources to power these systems
subsections.justification: This slide talks about general impacts and processes of refrigeration system upgrades, but does not mention the specific reduction in energy consumption at Lee's Market.

subsections.heading: Next Steps in Energy Optimization
subsections.content:
• Lee's Market plans to implement smart meters in all stores by Q3 2025
• The company is also exploring partnerships with local renewable energy providers
• A plan is in place to upgrade the HVAC systems in the next fiscal year
• Lee's Market aims to achieve a 40% reduction in overall energy consumption by 2027
• The company also plans to extend its energy efficiency training program to all employees
subsections.justification: This slide focuses on future energy optimization plans and goals, not the impact of the past refrigeration system upgrades.

conclusion: The upgrade of our refrigeration systems has resulted in significant reductions in energy consumption. We will continue to pursue energy-efficient technologies for further improvements in our operations.
